session_focus.summary: This session: triaged 6 candidate global Claude Code skills for redundancy against gstack/toolforge, migrated 3 (session-wrap, skill-health-monitor, automation-audit) into toolforge/skills with deep-review rewrites, retired 3 broken/redundant ones. Registered 4 orphaned skill directories into manifest.json. Traced and fixed 6 real bugs in run-tool.ps1 (skill discovery/execution pipeline) plus the telemetry API's DB_PATH. Verified end-to-end with a real recorded skill run. Investigated and fixed a security-scanner FS-BINARY false-positive in both tracked copies of skill-security-auditor.py, after first trying (and correctly reverting) a file-rename approach that would have silently undone itself. Fixed two broken git hooks (pre-commit pwsh -File/.ps1 mismatch) blocking every commit in the toolforge repo. Closed out TODOS.md TorqueQuery hardening item and cleaned up scratch/stale files.
